name: spinner-empty
visual_summary: A spinner-empty is a visually empty spinner used to indicate waiting or loading status. It is typically used to show that a process is in progress but does not yet have any content to display. A developer would use this component when they want to convey a sense of waiting without overwhelming the user with unnecessary visual elements.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready loader component with the following characteristics:

Name: spinner-empty
Description: A spinner-empty is a visually empty spinner used to indicate waiting or loading status. It is typically used to show that a process is in progress but does not yet have any content to display. A developer would use this component when they want to convey a sense of waiting without overwhelming the user with unnecessary visual elements.
Style: e.g. material, modern
Interactions: static
Tags: loading, progress, indeterminate

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
